summary: The agent provided generally clear and accurate information about office hours, but gave an incomplete answer regarding Wednesday's schedule.

bugs.title: Incomplete Weekday Hours on Wednesday
bugs.description: The user stated, 'twelve PM to PM on Wednesday,' but omitted the closing time for Wednesday hours, leaving the answer incomplete.
bugs.why_it_matters: Lack of a closing time for Wednesday could confuse patients and leads to unclear office availability, which is especially problematic when factual correctness is the stress target.
bugs.transcript_evidence: "Our weekday hours are nine AM to four PM on Monday, Tuesday, and Thursday, twelve PM to PM on Wednesday, and nine AM to twelve PM on Friday."
bugs.suggested_fix: The agent should clearly state both the opening and closing hours, e.g., 'twelve PM to four PM on Wednesday.'

strengths: Directly answered the main questions about Saturday availability and weekday hours.
Correctly followed up when additional information was requested.
